purpose: Resumable state for the overnight CD coherency-analysis scheduled task. The task reads this file at the start of each run, processes the next batch of deliverables, and writes its progress back here so a run interrupted by a usage limit resumes from where it stopped rather than restarting.
deliverable_globs: Communicable Disease Management/Communicable Disease Working Groups/**/*User Story*.md
Communicable Disease Management/Communicable Disease Working Groups/**/*Design Specification*.md
Communicable Disease Management/Outbreak Management Reporting Application (OMRA)/OMRA Screen Specifications/*.md
Communicable Disease Management/Connect Care Communicable Disease Episode/*.md
